message: Morning, all. Laptop open, brain mostly engaged - jalapeño corn dog copy is in the doc. Fair warning: I leaned into the nostalgia angle pretty hard on this one, but I think it earns it.
Nostalgia only works if the technique backs it up - read what you actually wrote about the heat management.
You're right - I buried the actual heat progression in there instead of leading with it. Rewrote that section to show the buildup instead of just naming the spice.
That's better. Heat buildup reads cleaner now - people actually understand why they're biting into it.
That heat progression fix is exactly what makes it land - people get *why* they need it, not just that it's spicy.
So we're locked in with this version then - the heat buildup copy goes live?
